sentence: Where do we store the information?:

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: All information you provide to us is stored on our secure server.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: Unfortunately, the transmission of information via the internet is not completely secure. Although we will do our best to protect your personal data, we cannot guarantee the security of your data transmitted to our site; any transmission is at your own risk. Once we have received your information, we will use strict procedures and security features to try to prevent unauthorised access.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: Our website is hosted by Amazon Web Services (‘AXS’). AWS is protected from DDoS attack (UDP flood), as well as extensive custom firewall rule and large mod security rule sets, protecting servers from a variety of forms of attack. In the event of heavy flooding, the servers have data centre enable network level flood protection. Datacentres are also highly secure facilities with restricted access. Finally, hosting service employs additional server security methods and precautions that are confidential.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: How long do we retain data for?

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: Our stance on data retention is guided in accordance with best industry practice. We retain data relating to Individuals for a period of one year, and collated information related to broader Community Activities for a period of two years. Once a retention period has expired, data is deleted automatically, or destroyed under confidential conditions.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: Why do we process personal data?

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: The data enables us to carry out our obligations arising from any service arrangement entered into between you and us in providing you with the information, responses and/or services that your request from us. The data is necessary to ensure that the content from our site is presented in the most effective manner for your and your computer.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.

sentence: We do not share data with individuals, companies or organisations except under the following circumstances: 2. For processing by third parties – including business partners, suppliers and sub-contractors for the performance of any contract we enter into with you, analytics and search engine providers that assist us in the improvement and optimization of our site.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: We do not share data with individuals, companies or organisations except under the following circumstances: 3. For Legal Reasons – If we are under a duty to disclose or share your personal data in order to comply with any legal obligation, or in order to enforce or apply our terms of use and other agreements; or to protect the rights, property, or safety of Niall Austin or others. This includes exchanging information with other companies and organisations for the purpose of fraud protection and credit risk reduction.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: What is GDPR?

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is a piece of legislation prepared by the European Union that aims to give you more control over how your data is used and protected.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: GDPR affords you the following rights: 1. Right to be Informed: You have the right to be provided with “fair processing information”, which will be completely transparent about how we have gathered and will use your data. You have a right to be notified about any third-party processors with whom we share your personal data, along with the reason for doing so.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: GDPR affords you the following rights: 2. Right of Access: You have the right to confirmation that your personal data are being processed and to access a copy of your personal data. If you would like access to or a copy of the personal information we hold about you, to request a correction, or have any questions about how we may use it or to make a complaint, please contact the Data Protection Manager at the address shown above. Or, email info@inferno21.com Complaints will be dealt with by the Data Protection Manager, and will be responded to within 30 days at the latest.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: GDPR affords you the following rights: 3. Right of rectification: You have the right to have your personal data corrected if it is inaccurate or incomplete.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: GDPR affords you the following rights: 4. Right to Erasure: You have the right to have your personal data deleted from our systems in the following situations:

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: - When you withdraw consent

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: - Data deletion is to comply with a legal obligation

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: - Where the data was unlawfully processed

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: - Where it is no longer necessary

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: - Where you object to the processing

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: 5. Right to Data Portability: You have the right to obtain and reuse your personal data for your own purposes, without hindrance. Access to all supplied information is achieved simply by reviewing the Reader’s own Home Page. This information may then be copied and shared as required by the individual.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: 6. Right to Object: We, www.Inferno21.com will not be engaging in any Marketing activities that will involve the direct use of User’s data, so this right does not apply in such circumstance.

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: Use of Cookies

section: H1:Inferno Mobile App & Website > H3:Terms & Conditions, Private Policy, Cookie Policy and GDPR Compliance Statement.
sentence: The Inferno21 website uses temporary “session” cookies which enable a visitor’s web browser to remember which pages on this website have already been visited. A cookie is a small piece of data that may be stored on your computer or mobile device.
